understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to reach the gem tile marked '+' in each level, avoiding spikes, while managing limited turns and attempts.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is affected by gravity (downward pull). CLICK actions remove tiles and may cause the player to fall or move depending on gravity. MOVE_LEFT and MOVE_RIGHT change the player's horizontal position but can also cause vertical displacement due to gravity. Spike tiles end the run. Players have 2 attempts per level and 50 turns per attempt. Actions can fail if blocked or if a tile is already removed.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to reach the gem tile marked '+' in each level, avoiding spikes, while managing limited turns and attempts.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is affected by gravity (downward pull). CLICK actions remove tiles and may cause the player to fall or move depending on gravity. MOVE_LEFT and MOVE_RIGHT change the player's horizontal position but can also cause vertical displacement due to gravity. Spike tiles end the run. Players have 2 attempts per level and 50 turns per attempt. Actions can fail if blocked or if a tile is already removed.
